prompt: Wide-angle cinematic illustration. A long wooden banquet table in a dark hall. On the far RIGHT side, ONE rich person sits alone with mountains of food, warm golden light. On the far LEFT side, 99 poor thin people crowded together sharing one tiny empty plate, in cold blue shadow. Same table, extreme contrast. Painterly realism style. No text, no labels, no numbers anywhere.
insight: The richest 1% of humanity owns more wealth than the bottom 50% combined — a gap that has widened every decade since 1980.
